name: Pickler Pigs' Ears, Chinese Style
recipeIngredient: 1 Cucumber, unpeeled, seeded - and cut in chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare pigs' ears according to steps I and II in basic instructions; drain.
2. Return the ears to a pot with water to cover and add the first five ingredients listed above. Bring to a boil and simmer for 1 hour. Let meat cool in liquid. Discard the liquid and cut ears into 1/2 x 1-inch slices.
3. In a separate pot, bring 3 cups of water to a boil with the remaining vinegar, sugar, ginger, garlic, and salt. Turn off heat when boiling point is reached.
4. Cool the mixture to room temperature.
5. Add cucumber, onion, and bell pepper, along with the sliced pigs' ears. Chill in the refrigerator for at least 4 hours to blend flavors.
6. Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 1 week.
7. Serve as an appetizer or a cold meat side dish. Makes two quarts.
